# Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Scope

- [ ] iOS app
- [ ] Firmware
- [ ] YAML config
- [ ] Hardware docs
- [ ] Project docs

## Verification

- [ ] iOS build passed
- [ ] Firmware compiled or flashed
- [ ] BLE behavior checked
- [ ] Docs updated
- [ ] Not applicable items are explained below

## Notes

List hardware used, firmware toolchain status, and any known limitations.
